name: Lemon Pudding for Passover
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2 quart saucepan or the top of a double boiler, beat eggs well.
2. Combine the sugar and potato starch, then gradually whisk them into the beaten eggs.
3. Stir in lemon juice and water.
4. Cook the pudding mixture slowly over low heat or simmering water in the bottom of the double boiler, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens and bubbles begin to appear.
5. Remove from heat.
6. Pour or spoon into individual dessert cups or dishes.
7. Set aside to cool slightly before serving, or refrigerate until ready to serve.
